versions.version_description: This tab is for Dynamite. The chords were inspired from "The Groovy Guitar Dude's" YouTube tutorial.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause ah ah I'm in the stars tonight.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And set the night alight.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
    Shoes on, get up in the morn',[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Cup of milk, let's rock and roll.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  King Kong, kick the drum,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
Rolling on like a rolling stone.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
    Sing song when I'm walking home,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Jump up to the top LeBron.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  Ding dong call me on my phone,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Ice tea and a game of ping pong.  (huh!)[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
This is getting heavy,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready. (wooh-ooh!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Life is sweet as honey,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah, this beat cha-ching like money. (uh!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Disco overload,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm into, that I'm good to go.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
I'm diamond, you know I glow up,[/tab]
N.C.
  Hey, so let's go.

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause ah ah I'm in the stars tonight.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And set the night alight.  [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Shining through the city,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
With a little funk and soul.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
So I'mma light it up like dynamite, woah-oh-oh.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   Bring a friend, join the crowd,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Whoever wanna come along.[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
 Word up, talk the talk,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
Just move like we off the wall.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   Day or night the sky's alight,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So we dance to the break of dawn.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]
Ladies and gentlemen, I got the medicine,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
So you should keep ya eyes on the ball, huh.[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
This is getting heavy,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready. (wooh-ooh!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Life is sweet as honey,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah, this beat cha-ching like money. (uh!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Disco overload,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm into, that I'm good to go.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
I'm diamond, you know I glow up,[/tab]
N.C.
  And so let's go.

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause ah ah I'm in the stars tonight.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And set the night alight.  (hey!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Shining through the city,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
With a little funk and soul.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
So I'mma light it up like dynamite, woah-oh-oh.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
Dynanana nana nanana nanana,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
Life is dynamite.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
Dynanana nana nanana nanana,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
Life is dynamite.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
So I'mma light it up like dynamite, woah-oh-oh.[/tab]

N.C.
Dynanana nananana eh.

Dynanana nananana eh.
N.C.
Dynanana nananana eh.
N.C.
Light it up like dynamite.
